Bananas
Ottawa · Baseline Rd · Est. 2021

Created in Brazsil.
Grown in Ottawa.

A café, a table, and a room — where Brazilian soul meets Canadian home. Not a restaurant. Not just coffee. A state of mind you didn't know you needed.

Nossa História

You don't need to speak
Portuguese to feel
at home here.

That's Bananas was born from a craving — for the kind of breakfast Brazil does best, and a place Ottawa had never seen. Pão de queijo fresh from the oven. Coffee the way your avó made it. The warmth of a table where time moves differently.

We are not a "Brazilian restaurant." We are Ottawa's café with a Brazilian soul — familiar enough to be your daily ritual, different enough to remind you there's a bigger world out there.

"Some flavours only exist in memory. We keep them alive."
01
Authenticity
Recipes from Brazilian grandmothers. No adaptations, no compromises.
02
Community
A meeting point for Ottawa's multicultural soul. All backgrounds, one table.
03
Belonging
Whether you've been here 30 years or 30 days — this place is yours.
04
Intention
Every detail considered. From the coffee to the music to the light.

The Room
Kids Party
Our Vibe
Chef Ana's Kitchen Party

Your kid cooks
the party.
You enjoy the café.

No more generic party halls. No pizza from a box. At That's Bananas, the kids become the chefs — guided by our owner through a real cooking experience. They make brigadeiros, mini pizzas, and more. They eat what they made. They go home with the recipe.


While they cook, you relax. Parents enjoy the café next door — coffee, feijoada, a quiet table. For up to 2 hours, you get the afternoon they get the memory.

01
Kids arrive at The Room
Chef Ana welcomes them. Aprons on, names on the chalkboard. The kitchen is theirs.
02
They cook, for real
Brigadeiro, mini pizza, tapioca. Every child makes their own. Hands in the dough. No spectating.
03
Parents chill next door
The café is yours. Coffee, lunch, a book. Two hours where you're not needed — and that's a gift.
04
They eat what they made
The party table is set. Kids sit with their creations, proud and hungry. You join for the end.
Starter · Ages 4–7
Little Chefs
Up to 8 kids · 90 minutes
  • Brigadeiro — 3 flavours
  • Mini pizza with toppings bar
  • Fresh lemonade (they squeeze it)
  • Recipe card to take home
  • Photo moment with Chef Ana
$320
Entire party · not per child
★ Most Popular · Ages 6–10
Petit Chefs
Up to 12 kids · 2 hours
  • Brigadeiro bar — 5 flavours
  • Mini pizza + tapioca station
  • Pão de queijo from scratch
  • Custom birthday cake by Chef Ana
  • Printed recipe booklet
  • Photos + video reel of the party
  • Parents' table set in the café
$520
Entire party · catering included
Premium · Ages 8–13
Master Chefs
Up to 15 kids · 2.5 hours
  • Full Brazilian menu build
  • Coxinha, brigadeiro, mini churrasco
  • Custom aprons to keep
  • Chef Ana's personal recipe book
  • Full catering for parents included
  • Professional reel for social media
  • Certificate of completion
$780
Entire party · everything included

Reviews

What Ottawa
is saying.

4.9
★★★★★
Based on 200+ reviews · Google & Instagram
AP
Ana Paula M.
Brazilian · Ottawa · Regular
★★★★★

"Finally a place in Ottawa that feels like home without being kitsch about it. The feijoada is the real thing — not adapted, not softened. Just right. I come every Saturday and I still get emotional."

Feijoada
MT
Mike T.
Canadian · Baseline Rd neighbour
★★★★★

"I walked in not knowing what pão de queijo was. Now I come twice a week and it's genuinely the best thing I eat all day. The staff made me feel like I belonged there from day one."

Pão de Queijo
PS
Priya S.
Event organizer · Ottawa
★★★★★

"Booked The Room for a cultural evening with 18 people. The space, the food, the energy — everything was perfect. The owner was incredibly professional and warm. Already planning our next event here."

The Room
LK
Laura K.
Mom · Ottawa · Kids party host
★★★★★

"My daughter's 7th birthday at Chef Ana's Kitchen Party was the best decision I made all year. She STILL talks about making her own brigadeiros. The parents had amazing food too. 10/10, already booked for next year."

Kids Party
RC
Rafael C.
Brazilian · Ottawa since 2019
★★★★★

"Esse lugar me salvou. Sério. Quando bate saudade e eu preciso de um caldo de feijão ou de um pão de queijo de verdade, é aqui que eu venho. Obrigado por existir em Ottawa."

Comunidade
JW
James W.
Remote worker · Daily regular
★★★★★

"This is my office now. The WiFi is fast, the music is always exactly right, and nobody rushes you. I do my best work here. The coffee is outstanding and the cheese bread has ruined me for everything else."

The Café
👧
"Chef Ana let me put the chocolate on by myself. It was the best birthday ever."

More than food —
a piece of Brazil
in Ottawa.

Noite Cultural
Noite do Pagode
22
Mar

Live music, petiscos, and the energy of Brazilian samba. Open to the community — Brazilians and curious souls welcome.

7 pm – 10 pm · Free entry
Workshop
Learn to make Brigadeiro
29
Mar

A hands-on family workshop. Bring the kids, learn the original recipe, discover the story behind Brazil's most beloved sweet.

2 pm – 4 pm · $25/person
Jantarzinho
Brazilian-Canadian Churrasco
05
Abr

The best of both worlds. Brazilian cuts with a Canadian touch. Limited edition — 30 guests only, intimate and curated.

6 pm – 9 pm · $45/person
Weekly Tradition
Saturday Feijoada
Every
Sat

Brazil's national dish, served the traditional way. Rice, collard greens, farofa, orange. The sacred Saturday ritual — 12 pm sharp.

12 pm – 3 pm · $28/plate
